distribution.iterations: temp.radius = math.random(10, 20); temp.depth = temp.radius * 0.5 * math.random(0.8, 1.2); temp.aspect = temp.radius / temp.depth; temp.cx = v.originx; temp.cy = v.originy; temp.cz = v.originz; temp.grid_xz = (temp.radius) * 2 + 1; temp.grid_y = (temp.depth) + 1; return temp.grid_xz * temp.grid_xz * temp.grid_y;
